title: Gen AI Applications — Landscape
subtitle: Your brain map — not IBM's syllabus · parallel branches · double-click to drill down

nodes.label: 1 · Talk to the model
nodes.definition: Env, API key, model id, one invoke — prove the model responds before you build anything else.
nodes.whyItMatters: Foundation of every branch. Coursera is practice; this is your control surface.
nodes.safeSentence: Get a model to respond at all.

note.summary: Generic: credentials → LLM client factory → smoke invoke. Coursera/IBM/OpenAI are examples linked in the drill-down map.

nodes.label: 2 · Prompting
nodes.definition: Templates, chat roles, few-shot, constraints — shape what the model sees before it thinks.
nodes.whyItMatters: Parallel to RAG, not inside it. You prompt with and without retrieved docs.

nodes.label: 3 · Compose
nodes.definition: LangChain / LCEL — prompt | llm | parser, pre-built chains, provider swap.
nodes.whyItMatters: How you wire reliable steps. CRS 001 home; CRS 002 uses RetrievalQA chains.

nodes.label: 4 · Ground
nodes.definition: Vectors, chunks, embeddings, Chroma — turn files into searchable pieces.
nodes.whyItMatters: Evidence layer. RAG cannot work without ground first.

nodes.label: 5 · RAG
nodes.definition: Retrieve top-k chunks → augment prompt → generate — answer from evidence, not guesswork.
nodes.whyItMatters: CRS 002 M1 core. Sibling to prompting, not a replacement for the whole stack.

nodes.label: 6 · Memory & chat
nodes.definition: History list, follow-ups, sessions — “what is the aim of it?” needs prior turns.
nodes.whyItMatters: You passed 04 vs 07 here. Memory + retrieval together for doc-grounded chat.

nodes.label: 7 · Expose
nodes.definition: Script, REPL, Flask API, Gradio UI — same chain, different front door.
nodes.whyItMatters: CRS 001 Flask + CRS 002 Gradio. Apps reach humans or other systems here.
nodes.safeSentence: Let a human or app reach your chain.

nodes.label: 8 · Agentic
nodes.definition: Tools, loops, plan/act — model chooses actions; RAG becomes one tool among many.
nodes.whyItMatters: Bigger umbrella in autonomy, not in everything you have touched yet. Capstone 4 + later courses.
nodes.safeSentence: Let the model choose actions across tools.

note.summary: Later layer — uses branches 1–7 as ingredients. Not rushed; visible so you know where it sits.

paths.label: Your brain — 8 branches
paths.description: Parallel topics in one landscape. Double-click any bubble to open its drill-down map.

paths.label: Evidence lane
paths.description: Ground → RAG → Memory — how answers stay tied to your data.
